illustrativeNotice: Synthetic illustrative scenario—not a customer or production result.

orderedSteps.name: physical-ceiling
orderedSteps.rule: Declare the site- and window-specific physical ceiling without treating nameplate as dispatchable capacity.

orderedSteps.name: committed-load
orderedSteps.rule: Subtract protected and committed workload in the same operating window.

orderedSteps.name: policy-reserves
orderedSteps.rule: Subtract power, thermal, storage, water, SLA, and recovery reserves without double counting.

orderedSteps.name: evidence-adjustment
orderedSteps.rule: Exclude residual headroom whose topology, freshness, authority, or recovery dependencies cannot be proven.

orderedSteps.name: accepted-headroom
orderedSteps.rule: Record only the surviving quantity with validity window, binding constraint, evidence references, and expiry.

noProofRule: Missing, stale, conflicting, or unreviewed dependencies cannot contribute to accepted headroom.
limitations: The method does not create physical capacity.
Outputs cannot be transferred across sites or time windows without re-evaluation.
Commercial treatment requires separate contractual review.
